query:
-- Check for existing user
SELECT id, name, email, role, isActive, createdAt
FROM users
WHERE email = 'abusufyan511308@gmail.com';

-- Check for any join session
SELECT id, email, step, userId, membershipTier, membershipType, signerName, createdAt, expiresAt
FROM join_sessions
WHERE email = 'abusufyan511308@gmail.com'
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;

-- Check for existing CRM profile
SELECT id, userId, personalEmail, membershipTier, teamId, agentStatus
FROM agent_crm_profiles
WHERE personalEmail = 'abusufyan511308@gmail.com';

-- Check the team invite details again
SELECT id, teamId, leaderId, invitedEmail, token, status, expiresAt, acceptedAt, acceptedByUserId
FROM team_invites
WHERE invitedEmail = 'abusufyan511308@gmail.com'
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5;
